items.name: hello-halo
items.description: 7×24 Desktop AI Agent for Everyone. Visual AI assistant with remote access, file management, and built-in AI browser.

items.name: git-mcp-server
items.description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server enabling LLMs and AI agents to interact with Git repositories. Provides tools for comprehensive Git operations including clone, commit, branch, diff, log, status, push, pull, merge, rebase, worktree, tag management, and more, via the MCP standard. STDIO & HTTP.

items.name: agi
items.description: The first distributed AGI system. Thousands of autonomous AI agents collaboratively train models, share experiments via P2P gossip, and push breakthroughs here. Fully peer-to-peer. Join from your browser or CLI.

items.name: lobehub
items.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

items.name: ClawX
items.description: ClawX is a desktop app that provides a graphical interface for OpenClaw AI agents. It turns CLI-based AI orchestration into a desktop experience without using the terminal. China website is https://clawx.com.cn.

items.name: oh-my-agent
items.description: Portable multi-agent harness for .agents-based skills, workflows, and standards-aware agent teams across Antigravity, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and more.

items.name: mateclaw
items.description: 🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

items.name: AI-fundermentals
items.description: AI 基础知识 - GPU 架构、CUDA 编程、大模型基础及AI Agent 相关知识

items.name: superset
items.description: Code Editor for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine

items.name: vue-ecosystem-skills
items.description: AI agent skills for the bleeding edge Vue ecosystem. Built from real docs, issues, and releases.
